name: agentic-sdlc
description: Portable, governed agentic software delivery lifecycle for Codex CLI and Claude Code projects.

interface.shortDescription: Govern software delivery with portable agents and gates.
interface.longDescription: Initialize and operate a portable agentic SDLC with specialized roles, independent review, ten lifecycle gates, fail-closed applicability, and auditable project-owned run records.
defaultPrompt: Initialize the Agentic SDLC in this repository.
Orchestrate this task through the applicable lifecycle gates.
Show the current Agentic SDLC gate status.
